title: Active TB_baseline_ATBX_1380100_SV0
characteristics_ch1.1: distinct stages of tb: Active TB_baseline
extract_protocol_ch1: Peripheral whole blood (approx. 2.5 ml) was drawn into PAXgene blood RNA tubes (PreAnalytiX, Hombrechtikon, Switzerland) and stored at -80°C until RNA extraction (PAXgene Blood RNA kit; PreAnalytiX, Hilden, Germany).
extract_protocol_ch1.1: RNA libraries were prepared for sequencing using standard Illumina protocols
data_processing.1: Alignment of RNAseq fastq files to GRCh38.p10 using hisat2-2.05
data_processing.2: Quantification of RNAseq data against genome using featurecount 1.5.2.
data_processing.3: Normalization of quantized reads and differential gene expression calculation using DEseq2 1.34.0
data_processing.5: Supplementary_files_format_and_content: Expression matrix for 144 samples rounded to two digits with group information derived from expression matrix calculated by DEseq2

extract_protocol_ch1: Peripheral whole blood (approx. 2.5 ml) was drawn into PAXgene blood RNA tubes (PreAnalytiX, Hombrechtikon, Switzerland) and stored at -80°C until RNA extraction (PAXgene Blood RNA kit; PreAnalytiX, Hilden, Germany).
extract_protocol_ch1.1: RNA libraries were prepared for sequencing using standard Illumina protocols
data_processing.1: Alignment of RNAseq fastq files to GRCh38.p10 using hisat2-2.05
data_processing.2: Quantification of RNAseq data against genome using featurecount 1.5.2.
data_processing.3: Normalization of quantized reads and differential gene expression calculation using DEseq2 1.34.0
data_processing.5: Supplementary_files_format_and_content: Expression matrix for 144 samples rounded to two digits with group information derived from expression matrix calculated by DEseq2

extract_protocol_ch1: Peripheral whole blood (approx. 2.5 ml) was drawn into PAXgene blood RNA tubes (PreAnalytiX, Hombrechtikon, Switzerland) and stored at -80°C until RNA extraction (PAXgene Blood RNA kit; PreAnalytiX, Hilden, Germany).
extract_protocol_ch1.1: RNA libraries were prepared for sequencing using standard Illumina protocols
data_processing.1: Alignment of RNAseq fastq files to GRCh38.p10 using hisat2-2.05
data_processing.2: Quantification of RNAseq data against genome using featurecount 1.5.2.
data_processing.3: Normalization of quantized reads and differential gene expression calculation using DEseq2 1.34.0
data_processing.5: Supplementary_files_format_and_content: Expression matrix for 144 samples rounded to two digits with group information derived from expression matrix calculated by DEseq2
